steps.title: Identify the vertex
steps.content:
The function is in vertex form $a(x-h)^2+k$.
$$f(x)=\frac{1}{9}(x-7)^2+3$$
So the vertex is $(7,3)$.

steps.title: Interpret the minimum
steps.content: Because $$\frac{1}{9}>0$$, the parabola opens upward, so the vertex gives the minimum height. The minimum height is $$3$$ inches above the ground. The answer is A.
